translations.### Crashlytics + Google Analytics 自動查詢: ### Crashlytics + Google Analytics Automated Query for App Crash-Free Users Rate
translations.#### 使用 Google Apps Script 自動填入數據到 Googl: #### Automatically Insert Data into Google Sheet Using Google Apps Script
translations.#### 新增 Trigger 排程自動執行\n\n: #### Add Trigger to Schedule Automatic Execution
translations.**crashAffectedUsers** ：受閃退影響的使用者數量\n: **crashAffectedUsers**: Number of users affected by crashes
translations.**crashFreeUsersRate** ：不受閃退影響的使用者百分比(小數: **crashFreeUsersRate**: The percentage of users unaffected by crashes (expressed as a decimal)
translations.*p.s. 不同於上一篇使用 Big Query 需要花錢查詢資料，此篇查詢 C: *p.s. Unlike the previous article using Big Query which costs money to query data, this article's method for querying Crash-Free Users Rate and using Google Apps Script is completely free and safe to use.*
translations.*上篇「 [Crashlytics + Big Query 打造更即時便利的 C: *In the previous article "[Crashlytics + Big Query: Building a More Real-Time and Convenient Crash Tracking Tool](../e77b80cc6f89/)", we exported Crashlytics crash records as raw data to Big Query and used Google Apps Script to schedule automatic queries for the Top 10 Crashes and post messages to a Slack Channel.*
translations.*可以回頭打開 Firebase Crashlytics 比對同樣條件數據是否相: *You can go back and open Firebase Crashlytics to compare if the data under the same conditions matches.*
translations.*這邊有發現兩邊數字可能會有微微差距(我們有一項數字差了 0.0002)，原因不: *There may be slight differences between the two numbers here (we found a difference of 0.0002), the reason is unknown, but it is within an acceptable margin of error; if we consistently use GA Crash-Free Users Rate, then it can no longer be considered an error.*
translations.- **crashAffectedUsers**: Number of user:
- **crashAffectedUsers**: Number of users affected by crashes

- **crashFreeUsersRate**: The percentage of users unaffected by crashes (expressed as a decimal)

- Remember to select GA4 at the top left corner

- The first function to select is "execute"

- The time-based trigger can select a weekly timer to track and add data once a week

translations.googleSheetName：Google Sheet 中閃退紀錄的 Shee: googleSheetName: The name of the Sheet in Google Sheet for crash records
translations.time based trigger 可選擇 week timer 每週追蹤＆新: time based trigger can select week timer to track and add data once a week
translations.一開始我以為這個數據同樣能從 Big Query 查詢出來；但其實這方向完全錯誤: At first, I thought this data could also be queried from Big Query; but this approach was completely wrong because Big Query contains raw crash data and does not include data for users without crashes, so it cannot calculate the Crash-Free Users Rate. There is little information online about this requirement, and after a long search, I found someone mentioning the keyword Google Analytics. I knew Firebase Analytics and Events could be linked to GA for querying, but I didn’t expect the Crash-Free Users Rate data to be included as well. After reviewing the GA API, Bingo!
translations.使用 Google Apps Script 透過 Google Analytic: Using Google Apps Script to Query Crashlytics via Google Analytics and Automatically Fill Data into Google Sheet
translations.假設我們的 Google Sheet 如上圖。\n\n: Assuming our Google Sheet is as shown in the above image.
translations.再來就是自動化的部分，我們將使用 Google Apps Script 查詢 G: Next is the automation part. We will use Google Apps Script to query the GA Crash-Free Users Rate data and automatically fill it into our Google Sheet; achieving the goal of automatic entry and tracking.
translations.再來我們只要再加上自動填入 Google Sheet 就大功告成了！\n\n: Next, all we need to do is add automatic input into Google Sheet, and we're all set!
translations.再次點擊上方 Run or Debug 執行「execute」。\n\n: Click the Run or Debug button above again to execute "execute".
translations.可以點擊 Google Sheet 上方的 Extensions -&gt; A: You can click Extensions -> Apps Script on the top of Google Sheet to create a Google Apps Script, or [click here to visit Google Apps Script](https://script.google.com/home/start){:target="_blank"} -> then click New Project on the top left.
translations.可參考 [官方說明](https://support.google.com/an: You can refer to the [official guide](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9289234?hl=zh-Hant){:target="_blank"} for setup steps; they are omitted in this article.
translations.右方登入完帳號後，選擇相應的 GA Account & Property\n: After logging in on the right, select the corresponding GA Account & Property.
translations.回到 Google Sheet，數據新增成功！\n\n: Back to Google Sheet, data added successfully!
translations.回到剛剛的 [GA4 Query Explorer](https://ga-de: Go back to the [GA4 Query Explorer](https://ga-dev-tools.web.app/ga4/query-explorer/){:target="_blank"} tool. Next to the Make Request button, you can check "Show Request JSON" to get the Request JSON for this query.
translations.在一開始的選擇 Property 選單中，選擇的 Property 下方的數字就: In the initial Property selection menu, the number below the chosen Property is the `propertyId`.
translations.在左上方記得選到 GA4\n: Remember to select GA4 at the top left corner
translations.在左方的「Services」點「+」加上「Google Analytics Da: Click the "+" next to "Services" on the left and add "Google Analytics Data API".
translations.執行成功會在下方 Log Print 出 Crash-Free Users Ra: If executed successfully, the Crash-Free Users Rate will be printed in the log below, indicating a successful query.
If you want to sync the results to a Slack Channel, you can refer to the [previous article](../e77b80cc6f89/):
translations.將以上程式碼貼到 Google Apps Script 右方程式碼區塊＆上方執行: Paste the above code into the right-side code editor in Google Apps Script, then select the "execute" function from the dropdown menu at the top and click Debug to test if the data can be retrieved correctly:
translations.將此 Request JSON 轉換成 Google Apps Script 後: After converting this Request JSON into Google Apps Script, it looks like this:
translations.我們只需專注在解決 App Crash 問題！\n\n: We only need to focus on solving App Crash issues!
translations.拉到最下面點擊「Make Request」查看結果，我們就能得到指定日期範圍內的: Scroll to the bottom and click "Make Request" to see the results. This will give us the Crash-Free Users Rate for the specified date range.
translations.按照步驟完成帳號授權即可。\n\n: Complete the account authorization by following the steps.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本篇接續自動化一個與 App 閃退相關的重要數據 — **Crash-Free: This article continues the automation of an important app crash-related metric — **Crash-Free Users Rate**, the percentage of unaffected users. Many app teams continuously track and record this data. Traditionally, this was done manually. The goal here is to automate this repetitive task and avoid errors from manual data entry. As mentioned before, Firebase Crashlytics does not provide any API for querying, so we need to connect Firebase data to other Google services and use their APIs to retrieve the relevant data.
translations.現在開始，紀錄追蹤 App Crash-Free Users Rate 數據完全: Start fully automating the tracking of App Crash-Free Users Rate data; no manual queries or data entry needed; let the machine handle everything automatically!
translations.知道路通之後，就可以開始動手實作了！\n\n: Once you understand the workflow, you can start implementing it!
translations.第一個 function 選擇「execute」\n: The first function to select is "execute"
translations.第一次執行會出現要求授權視窗：\n\n: The first time you run it, an authorization window will appear:
translations.設定完點擊 Save 即可。\n\n: After setting up, simply click Save.
translations.進來後可以先點上方未命名專案名稱，給個專案名稱。\n\n: After entering, you can first click the untitled project name at the top and give the project a name.
translations.選擇左方時鐘按鈕 -> 右下方「+ Add Trigger」。\n\n: Select the clock icon on the left -> "+ Add Trigger" at the bottom right.
translations.針對雙平台的 Crash Free Users Rate 分別查詢。\n\n: Query the Crash Free Users Rate separately for both platforms.
translations.開始寫 Code 之前，我們可以先用官方提供的 Web GUI Tool 來快速: Before writing any code, we can first use the official Web GUI Tool to quickly build query conditions and get query results; after confirming the results are what we want, we can start coding.
